Follow-up Email Ready for Approval

Role: ={{ $json.job_title }}

Days Since Applied: ={{ $json.days_since_applied }}

Proposed Email:

={{ $json.email_body }}

Actions:

Go to N8N and click 'Resume' to approve and send.

Click 'Stop' to discard this follow-up.

⚠️ IMPORTANT: Every follow-up requires your manual approval. Nothing is sent automatically.
